top_signals.title: IMO Releases Revised Rescue Guide
top_signals.summary: UNHCR, the UN Refugee Agency, the IMO, and the International Chamber of Shipping (ICS) have released a revised Rescue Guide, a tool to help all partners uphold the humanitarian and legal duties to rescue refugees and migrants in distress at…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
